message.content:
你是獨立驗證者（與發現此問題的 reviewer 不同 context）。盡力反駁以下 finding 是真問題——它可能是誤報。
若你能證明它不是問題（誤讀程式碼 / 已被別處處理 / 不在執行路徑），判 isReal=false。若反駁失敗，判 isReal=true。
Finding：{"severity":"high","where":".claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md 第 3.2 節（69-72行）與 BC-3（186-187行）；實際程式碼缺口在 src/token-policy.ts:16-66 + src/commands/relay.ts:491-497 + src/index.ts:985-991","problem":"設計文件 3.2 節與 BC-3 宣稱「SELF_EVAL 的 payload 消費邏輯只需要新增在 relay.ts:491、index.ts:985、run-prompt.ts:817 三處」，但其中兩處（relay.ts:491、index.ts:985）緊接著在下一行（relay.ts:497 / index.ts:991）就呼叫 `filterTransformedByPolicy(proxyTokensRaw, "proxy")`——這是專案既有的顯式白名單機制（src/token-policy.ts），其自身文件註解明白寫著設計意圖：「權限靠宣告不靠遺漏……未來 refactor 可能誤開」。`TOKEN_POLICY.proxy` 目前刻意排除 scheduleTokens/goalDone/restartToken/skillPropose/wikiQuery/continueToken/specialistProxy/moaPlan 等欄位（只放行 sendFiles/askTokens/skillUsages/stickerEmotions/rememberFacts），理由是 specialist proxy 輸出的信任層級低於主 agent。但 `filterTransformedByPolicy` 的實作是「只歸零 FIELD_ZERO 表裡列出的欄位」（token-policy.ts:109-124），任何新增到 `TransformedReply` 卻沒同步加進 `TokenKind`/`FIELD_ZERO`/`TOKEN_POLICY` 的欄位，會完全繞過這道白名單、無條件通過——不管來源是 main 還是 proxy。設計文件第 8 節『改動檔案清單』完全沒有列出 `src/token-policy.ts`，第 3、4、7 節也都沒有提到這個機制或需要對它做的決策。","fix":"在第 3 節新增 3.2a 小節做因果鏈分析：grep `filterTransformedByPolicy` 找出的 2 個呼叫點（relay.ts:497、index.ts:991），逐一判斷 selfEval 是否該對 proxy 來源開放。若決定不開放（比照 scheduleTokens/goalDone 等既有低信任欄位），需把 `selfEval` 加進 `TokenKind` 型別與 `FIELD_ZERO` 映射表（zero: null），並刻意不加進 `TOKEN_POLICY.proxy`，讓它在 proxy 路徑被正確歸零；若決定開放，需在 BC-3 或新 BC 中明確寫出理由與驗證方式（例如替 `SelfEvalEntry` 加一個 `source: "main"|"proxy"` 欄位區分信任來源，避免 specialist 輸出的自評分數被記錄成主 agent 的誠實自評，污染 observability 訊號）。同時把 `src/token-policy.ts` 加進第 8 節檔案清單，並修正 BC-3 的測試計畫，讓測試真的走過 `filterTransformedByPolicy` 這一步（而不是只單測 `transform()` 本身），否則测试無法偵測這個繞過。","lens":"security 審查 + correctness 因果鏈獨立複驗（對 P1-design-spec.md，尚未有 code diff，審查對象是設計文件本身）。

對抗驗證方法：對文件 3.1/3.2/3.3 節列出的每一個檔案:行號逐條用 grep/Read 重新核對，不採信文件自身的敘述。

複驗結果：
- 3.1 節（buildPreambleWithBreakdown 3 個呼叫點：sessionManager.ts:438 / scheduler.ts:291 / memory.ts:353）— grep 全庫核對，CONFIRMED 逐字正確。
- 3.2 節（transformReplyTokens 6 個呼叫點）— grep 全庫核對，CONFIRMED 恰好 6 處：relay.ts:491、index.ts:985、run-prompt.ts:219/817、telegram-ui.ts:468/509；run-prompt.ts:195-206 的排除清單註解逐字核對也 CONFIRMED。但複驗過程中發現文件本身沒有分析到的下游安全機制（見 high finding）。
- 3.3 節（usageStore.ts 與 atomicJson.ts 的引用註解）— 逐句核對 CONFIRMED，唯一瑕疵見 low finding。
- 3.4 節誠實標註為 🟡B級（未重讀 memory 原文），文件自己有揭露不確定性，此為誠實邊界應有的做法，不算缺陷。

總體 verdict：這份設計文件在「因果鏈分析是否經得起獨立重新驗證」這件事上，對已列出的三個檔案（memory.ts / observerTransformer.ts / usageStore.ts）做得相當紮實、逐字可查證——但對 src/token-policy.ts 這個明確存在、且直接位於 3.2 節所列兩個消費點（relay.ts:491、index.ts:985）之後、緊鄰下一行程式碼（relay.ts:497、index.ts:991）的白名單安全機制完全沒有分析到，導致 BC-3 的「消費點完整覆蓋」宣稱在其中兩個消費點上實際不成立（新 token 種類會繞過白名單而非被正確歸零或正確放行）。這不是文件刻意排除、有理由記錄在案的範圍決策（不像第 6 節列的其他取捨都附了理由），而是因果鏈分析本身的漏項，需要修訂第 3、4、7、8 節後才能進入實作。其餘為 medium/low 等級的補強建議。"}
審查目標：審查對象：G:/AI/telegram-kiro-bridge-main/.claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md（跨 ACP backend 量化自評 SELF_EVAL token 的設計規格，尚未實作、無 code diff）。這份文件本身依 CLAUDE.md Section 12.6 R-2 屬「方法論修改」（提議在 CLAUDE.md 新增章節），需要異源 cross-source review，不可用設計 workflow 自己的產出當作已審查。請針對：(1) correctness lens — 因果鏈分析（3.1/3.2/3.3節列的呼叫點清單）是否經得起獨立重新驗證，用 grep/read 實際核對 src/observerTransformer.ts、src/memory.ts、src/run-prompt.ts、src/commands/relay.ts、src/index.ts、src/usageStore.ts 的相關行號與說法是否屬實；(2) security lens — 新 token 協定（<<SELF_EVAL:score|evidence>>）、balanced-scanner handler、atomicJson 寫入路徑有無注入/資源耗盡/資料汙染風險；(3) repro-quality lens — BC-1~BC-6 是否可測試、有無過度設計或範圍蔓延、待實作前確認事項（第7節）是否遺漏。輸出仍照 dev-review 既有格式（high/medium/low + 對抗驗證 + verdict）。
用 Read/Grep 實際查證程式碼，不要憑空判斷。

attachment.content:
- claude-mem-curate: 把 claude-mem 抽出的 shortlist 精選成少量繁體中文、去重後寫進 AIMemory。當使用者說「精選/整理 claude-mem」「把最近重點存記憶」,或每日自動 ingestion 時使用。
- dual-skill-review-loop: Use when producing any deliverable that needs quality assurance — writing, reports, proposals, code designs — and you want the output to reach ≥95 score through structured self-review iterations
- excel-to-ai-doc: Convert image-heavy Excel game spec spreadsheets (.xlsx) into an AI-readable knowledge structure — Markdown text + extracted original images (anchored to their source cells) + metadata.json. Use when the user wants to turn a 規格書/spec/design xlsx into something an AI or agent can read, asks to "convert this spec to markdown", "make this xlsx AI-readable", "extract images and tables from this spreadsheet for analysis", or needs to feed a slot/game spec workbook to a vision model. Triggers on game design specs, paytables, UI/flow screenshots embedded in .xlsx. NOT for clean tabular data exports (use a plain csv/markdown converter) or non-xlsx files.
- huashu-slides: AI演示文稿全流程制作：内容结构化→设计选型→AI插画/HTML构建→PPTX导出。17种实战验证的视觉风格（漫画/极简/数据叙事/国风），可编辑HTML与全AI视觉两条路径自由选择。当用户提到"做PPT"、"制作幻灯片"、"演示文稿"、"Keynote"、"slides"、"课件"、"汇报材料"、"路演"时使用。
- knowhow-accumulation: Use when capturing lessons from AI failures into structured ❌→✅ records, when reviewing past interactions to extract reusable patterns, or when building a self-improving knowledge base from repeated mistakes
- memory-to-skill: 當使用者要求「檢視 session 資料夾並把內容整理成 skill」、需要從過去對話中抽取可重用模式、或要把剛剛完成的工作經驗固化成 skill 時使用
- ms-agent-scheduled-prompts: 當需要為 LLM agent bridge（Telegram bot、Slack bot、CLI UI）做延遲 / 常態性 prompt 觸發、排程 bridge 指令（如每天凌晨 /restart）、或要在 agent 回覆裡嵌 token 讓使用者自助建排程時使用
- ms-agent-text-token-signaling: 當 LLM agent 需要觸發 host 端動作（傳檔、開網址、執行指令）但協定不允許 agent 端發起自訂 RPC、或想在 streaming 文字回覆中加上 side effect 又不破壞聊天 UX 時使用
- ms-external-repo-absorption: ms-external-repo-absorption
- ms-kiro-strreplace-silent-fail: 當用 Kiro 的 strReplace 或 fs-edit 類工具改檔、tool 回報 Successfully replaced N occurrences 但事後 grep / read 發現磁碟內容沒變、或同一個檔案連續發幾個 strReplace 只有部分生效時使用
- ms-portable-skill-authoring: 當寫 skill 會被多個 agent CLI（Kiro / Codex / Claude）或多台機器共用、要避免把 F:\AI\AIMemory 或 ~/.kiro 這類絕對路徑寫死在 SKILL.md、或要讓 bridge 把環境差異注入成變數讓同一份 SKILL.md 跨機器重用時使用
- ms-streaming-token-pipeline: Use when a Telegram/Slack bot streams text via mid-turn edits plus a final render. Both paths must share one transform, or ASK buttons drop, half-tokens leak, and rate-limit recovery overwrites it.
- ms-telegram-ask-button-protocol: Use when emitting <<ASK:...>> for Telegram bridge buttons, or when an ASK token renders verbatim. Label soft cap 20 chars; >20 SHALL use numbered body list with short labels. See SKILL.md for limits.
- ms-telegram-bot-rate-limit-survival: 當 Telegram bot 對使用者 chat 串 streaming edit 或連發多則訊息、遇到 429 Too Many Requests / retry_after 愈累積愈長（60s→183s）、grammY autoRetry 超過 maxDelaySeconds 拋錯、或需要設計「限流期間凍結 UI + 限流結束後自動補發」時使用
- ms-wiki-knowledge-base: 當 agent bridge 要維運雙層記憶（facts + wiki 知識庫）時使用：執行 wikisync（topic shard 蒸餾成 wiki 頁）、factlint（facts 去重/去瑣碎/衰減/升格偵測）、wikilint（wiki 過時/孤兒/斷連健康檢查），或要為新 bridge 設計同款 wiki 維運流程時使用
- ms-windows-shell-exit-code-false-positive: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中跑 git clone、pip install、npm install、winget 等命令時，明明工作完成卻收到 exit code 1、stderr 有進度條或 notice、shell tool 回報失敗時使用
- ms-windows-shell-interactive-prompt: 當在 Windows PowerShell 或 cmd.exe 中執行讀檔、列目錄、搜尋指令（Get-Content、type、cat、more）導致 tool call 卡住不回、或在 Kiro agent 與 ACP bridge 裡看到 PowerShell 的互動式參數詢問（例如 Path 參數提示）時使用
- non-engineer-agent-design: Use when designing Custom GPT / Claude Project / Gemini Gem instructions for non-engineers, or when helping someone structure their AI workflow using the 5-piece framework (Agent, Skill, Steering, Hook, KnowHow)
- self-eval-prompt-pattern: Use when designing prompts or instructions that require AI to self-assess quality before delivering output, when setting up automated quality gates in Custom GPT / Project / Gem instructions, or when AI outputs need measurable pass/fail criteria
- skill-creator: Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.
- sync-fork-from-upstream: 當使用者要把自己的 fork / 下游倉庫同步到原專案（upstream）的最新更新時使用。觸發語包含「同步原專案」「拿上游更新」「sync upstream」「更新原專案」「原本的倉庫有更新怎麼拉」。涵蓋一次性 upstream remote 設定、半自動同步流程（fetch → 拋棄式分支試合併 → 型別檢查 → 停在衝突/失敗、絕不自動 push）、以及 fork 與 upstream 無共同歷史時的「重新接血脈」做法。
- ui-ux-pro-max: ui-ux-pro-max
- uk-slot-codegen: UK slot codegen 統一入口。使用者提供規格路徑+目標專案路徑，自動串接 adapter→codegen→validation 全流程。支援新專案/增量更新/僅驗證三種模式，每步 checkpoint 可中斷恢復。
- uk-slot-extrabet: UK 老虎機 ExtraBet（額外押注/加倍投注）子系統指南。建立、修改、除錯 ExtraBet 功能，或處理 unshow/replay 還原、單倍率單步驟 / 多倍率兩步驟跳窗變體、多倍率 type 時觸發。涵蓋 framework ExtraBetComponent / extraBetController、專案 ExtraBetWindow 跳窗、ExtraBetEffectManager 動畫、SlotReels 假轉輪整合、GameView 整合多方關係。
- uk-slot-fake-reel-manager: FakeReelManager 假轉輪帶建立、修改、檢查或擴充
- uk-slot-multilang-sync: 把規格 xlsx 的多國語言文字批次同步進 uk 線上老虎機框架各語系的 gameStrings.xml。當使用者要在老虎機專案新增/更新多國語言字串、提到 「gameStrings.xml」「多國語言」「多語系文字」「i18n 字串」「把 xlsx 的翻譯填進去」、 或要為某個 Key 一次寫入多國(常見 26 國)文字時使用。僅適用線上部門 uk 框架 (plist 格式 gameStrings.xml、每語系一目錄、欄標題括號內為語系代碼); 商用部門或其他文字格式不適用。
- uk-slot-pattern-library: uk-slot-pattern-library
- uk-slot-project-docs: uk-slot-project-docs
- uk-slot-spec-to-impl: 當拿到一份 UK 老虎機遊戲規格書（xlsx）要開發新遊戲、使用者說「從規格書實作」「開新的 slot 專案」「規格書轉開發規格」、或要為新遊戲起專案/拆任務時使用。涵蓋 xlsx 轉換、差異開發規格、milestone 任務拆解三步驟。

- vc-kiro-delegate: 將實作任務委派給 Kiro CLI（headless mode + claude-opus-4.6）執行，把主 agent 的 Claude Max 5x 配額（5 小時 message cap）保留給協調與決策，把實作丟給 Kiro 的不限量訂閱算力。Claude Code 負責預估、規劃、light review；Kiro 負責具體實作與第一輪 self-review。當用戶說「用 kiro 做」「交給 kiro」「省 token」「叫 kiro 寫」時務必使用此 skill；當主 agent 自己評估某個任務「預估會花 2k+ tokens」時也要主動委派 — 例如新增函式、寫測試、重構函式、實作模組。即使用戶沒明說「kiro」，只要預估產出規模 ≥2k tokens，就主動委派並在訊息中告知預估值。

- superpowers:verification-before-completion: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
- superpowers:writing-plans: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code
- superpowers:writing-skills: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
- claude-mem:mem-search: Search claude-mem's persistent cross-session memory database. Use when user asks "did we already solve this?", "how did we do X last time?", or needs work from previous sessions.
- codex:codex-cli-runtime: Internal helper contract for calling the codex-companion runtime from Claude Code
- codex:codex-result-handling: Internal guidance for presenting Codex helper output back to the user
- codex:gpt-5-4-prompting: Internal guidance for composing Codex and GPT-5.4 prompts for coding, review, diagnosis, and research tasks inside the Codex Claude Code plugin
- webwright:webwright: Solve a user-specified web task code-as-action style by driving a local Playwright browser through one bash command at a time, saving screenshots and an action log into `final_runs/run_<id>/`, and visually verifying the result. Use when the user asks to automate a web task (search, filter, form-fill, multi-step flow, data extraction) and wants reusable scripts plus screenshot evidence rather than a one-shot answer.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:a11y-debugging: Uses Chrome DevTools MCP for accessibility (a11y) debugging and auditing based on web.dev guidelines. Use when testing semantic HTML, ARIA labels, focus states, keyboard navigation, tap targets, and color contrast.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:chrome-devtools: Uses Chrome DevTools via MCP for efficient debugging, troubleshooting and browser automation. Use when debugging web pages, automating browser interactions, analyzing performance, or inspecting network requests. This skill does not apply to `--slim` mode (MCP configuration).
- chrome-devtools-mcp:chrome-devtools-cli: Use this skill to write shell scripts or run shell commands to automate tasks in the browser or otherwise use Chrome DevTools via CLI.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:debug-optimize-lcp: Guides debugging and optimizing Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) using Chrome DevTools MCP tools. Use this skill whenever the user asks about LCP performance, slow page loads, Core Web Vitals optimization, or wants to understand why their page's main content takes too long to appear. Also use when the user mentions "largest contentful paint", "page load speed", "CWV", or wants to improve how fast their hero image or main content renders.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:memory-leak-debugging: Diagnoses and resolves memory leaks in JavaScript/Node.js applications. Use when a user reports high memory usage, OOM errors, or wants to analyze heapsnapshots or run memory leak detection tools like memlab.
- chrome-devtools-mcp:troubleshooting: Uses Chrome DevTools MCP and documentation to troubleshoot connection and target issues. Trigger this skill when list_pages, new_page, or navigate_page fail, or when the server initialization fails.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

1	/**
2	 * Token 執行權限顯式 policy 表。
3	 *
4	 * 設計意圖：「權限靠宣告不靠遺漏」。
5	 * 目前 proxy specialist 輸出的危險 token（SCHEDULE / RESTART / MOA_PLAN 等）
6	 * 只是剛好攝取點沒呼叫對應邏輯——未來 refactor 可能誤開。
7	 * 此模組以白名單形式宣告每個來源可以執行哪些 token kind，
8	 * filterTransformedByPolicy 在攝取點統一攔截非法 token。
9	 */
10	
11	import type { TransformedReply } from "./observerTransformer.js";
12	
13	// ─── 型別 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
14	
15	/** Token 來源。 */
16	export type TokenSource = "main" | "proxy" | "delegate";
17	
18	/** 所有可辨識的 token 種類（與 TransformedReply 欄位一一對應）。 */
19	export type TokenKind =
20	  | "sendFiles"
21	  | "scheduleTokens"
22	  | "askTokens"
23	  | "skillUsages"
24	  | "goalDone"
25	  | "restartToken"
26	  | "stickerEmotions"
27	  | "skillPropose"
28	  | "wikiQuery"
29	  | "continueToken"
30	  | "specialistProxy"
31	  | "moaPlan"
32	  | "rememberFacts";
33	
34	// ─── Policy 表 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
35	
36	/**
37	 * 各來源允許執行的 token 白名單。
38	 * - main：全部開放（主 agent 路徑完全信任）。
39	 * - proxy：僅限安全的 UI / 記憶類 token。
40	 * - delegate：delegate 輸出只當文字注入主 agent，不執行任何 token。
41	 */
42	export const TOKEN_POLICY: Record<TokenSource, ReadonlySet<TokenKind>> = {
43	  main: new Set<TokenKind>([
44	    "sendFiles",
45	    "scheduleTokens",
46	    "askTokens",
47	    "skillUsages",
48	    "goalDone",
49	    "restartToken",
50	    "stickerEmotions",
51	    "skillPropose",
52	    "wikiQuery",
53	    "continueToken",
54	    "specialistProxy",
55	    "moaPlan",
56	    "rememberFacts",
57	  ]),
58	  proxy: new Set<TokenKind>([
59	    "sendFiles",
60	    "askTokens",
61	    "skillUsages",
62	    "stickerEmotions",
63	    "rememberFacts",
64	  ]),
65	  delegate: new Set<TokenKind>([]),
66	};
67	
68	/** 查詢某來源是否允許執行某 token kind。 */
69	export function isTokenAllowed(source: TokenSource, kind: TokenKind): boolean {
70	  return TOKEN_POLICY[source].has(kind);
71	}
72	
73	// ─── 過濾函式 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
74	
75	/**
76	 * 每個 token kind 對應 TransformedReply 中的欄位名稱與歸零值的映射。
77	 * 注意：rememberFacts 刻意不在此表——REMEMBER token 不走 TransformedReply
78	 * （transform() 不解析它），enforcement 在 working-state.ts 的
79	 * extractMemoryTokensFromProxy 內查 isTokenAllowed() 執行。
80	 */
81	const FIELD_ZERO: Record<Exclude<TokenKind, "rememberFacts">, { key: keyof TransformedReply; zero: unknown }> = {
82	  sendFiles:       { key: "sendFiles",       zero: [] },
83	  scheduleTokens:  { key: "scheduleTokens",  zero: [] },
84	  askTokens:       { key: "askTokens",       zero: [] },
85	  skillUsages:     { key: "skillUsages",     zero: [] },
86	  goalDone:        { key: "goalDone",        zero: null },
87	  restartToken:    { key: "restartToken",    zero: null },
88	  stickerEmotions: { key: "stickerEmotions", zero: [] },
89	  skillPropose:    { key: "skillPropose",    zero: null },
90	  wikiQuery:       { key: "wikiQuery",       zero: null },
91	  continueToken:   { key: "continueToken",   zero: false },
92	  specialistProxy: { key: "specialistProxy", zero: null },
93	  moaPlan:         { key: "moaPlan",         zero: null },
94	};
95	
96	/**
97	 * 依 policy 過濾 TransformedReply：不在允許集合的欄位強制歸零。
98	 * 回傳淺拷貝：top-level 欄位不影響原物件，但保留欄位的陣列元素仍與
99	 * 原 reply 共享 reference——呼叫端應唯讀使用。text 保持不變。
100	 */
101	export function filterTransformedByPolicy(
102	  reply: TransformedReply,
103	  source: TokenSource,
104	): TransformedReply {
105	  const allowed = TOKEN_POLICY[source];
106	  const filtered: TransformedReply = { ...reply };
107	  const dropped: string[] = [];
108	
109	  for (const [kind, mapping] of Object.entries(FIELD_ZERO) as Array<
110	    [Exclude<TokenKind, "rememberFacts">, { key: keyof TransformedReply; zero: unknown }]
111	  >) {
112	    if (allowed.has(kind)) continue;
113	    // 判斷原欄位是否有非空內容
114	    const val = reply[mapping.key];
115	    const isEmpty =
116	      val === null ||
117	      val === undefined ||
118	      val === false ||
119	      (Array.isArray(val) && val.length === 0);
120	    if (!isEmpty) {
121	      dropped.push(kind);
122	    }
123	    (filtered as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)[mapping.key] = mapping.zero;
124	  }
125	
126	  if (dropped.length > 0) {
127	    console.warn(`[token-policy] source=${source} dropped: ${dropped.join(",")}`);
128	  }
129	
130	  return filtered;
131	}
132	
133	// ─── Remember facts 上限 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
134	
135	/** 單次 specialist 輸出允許回寫的最大 fact 條數。 */
136	export const REMEMBER_FACTS_MAX_PER_OUTPUT = 5;
